languages.text: Familiars seem to respond irratically to the sound of this whistle, but other than that it's just a trinket.

traits.locale_text: Familiars seem to respond irratically to the sound of this whistle, but other than that it's just a trinket.

languages.text: It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically. Still, it does not affect their combat capabilities.

traits.locale_text: It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically.
It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically. Still, it does not affect their combat capabilities.

It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically. Still, it does not affect their combat capabilities.

languages.text: Когда фамильяры слышат звук, издаваемый этой безделушкой, они начинают вести себя непредсказуемо. Впрочем, это не влияет на их эффективность в бою.
languages.original_text: It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically. Still, it does not affect their combat capabilities.

traits.locale_text: Когда фамильяры слышат звук, издаваемый этой безделушкой, они начинают вести себя непредсказуемо. Впрочем, это не влияет на их эффективность в бою.
Когда фамильяры слышат звук, издаваемый этой безделушкой, они начинают вести себя непредсказуемо. Впрочем, это не влияет на их эффективность в бою.

languages.text: 这只是件小小的饰品，但只要使仆听到这个口哨的声音，就会变得行为古怪。
languages.original_text: It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically.

traits.locale_text: 这只是件小小的饰品，但只要使仆听到这个口哨的声音，就会变得行为古怪。

languages.text: Ce n'est guère qu'un gadget, mais chaque fois que les familiers entendent ce sifflet-vox, ils adoptent un comportement imprévisible.
languages.original_text: It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically.

traits.locale_text: Ce n'est guère qu'un gadget, mais chaque fois que les familiers entendent ce sifflet-vox, ils adoptent un comportement imprévisible.
Ce n'est guère qu'un gadget, mais chaque fois que les familiers entendent ce sifflet-vox, ils adoptent un comportement imprévisible.

languages.text: No tiene propiedades especiales, pero, cuando los familiares oyen este voco silbato, se comportan de forma errática.
languages.original_text: It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically.

traits.locale_text: No tiene propiedades especiales, pero, cuando los familiares oyen este voco silbato, se comportan de forma errática.

languages.text: ただの小物だが、ファミリアーがこのヴォクス・ホイッスルの音を聞くと、不規則に行動する。
languages.original_text: It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically.

traits.locale_text: ただの小物だが、ファミリアーがこのヴォクス・ホイッスルの音を聞くと、不規則に行動する。

languages.text: Bu voks düdüğü, değersiz bir eşya gibi görünse de iyeler ne zaman sesini duysa bir garip davranmaya başlıyor.
languages.original_text: It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically.

traits.locale_text: Bu voks düdüğü, değersiz bir eşya gibi görünse de iyeler ne zaman sesini duysa bir garip davranmaya başlıyor.

languages.text: Sie ist nur ein Schmuckstück, aber wenn Vertraute den Klang dieser Vox-Pfeife hören, verhalten sie sich sonderbar.
languages.original_text: It's just a trinket, but whenever familiars hear the sound of this vox-whistle, they behave erratically.

traits.locale_text: Sie ist nur ein Schmuckstück, aber wenn Vertraute den Klang dieser Vox-Pfeife hören, verhalten sie sich sonderbar.
